creator: pgollucci@riderway.com
text:
Note that files/patch-apr-util_build_dbm.m4  [1] has been submitted up 
stream to dev@apr.apache.org.

This will also let us remove files/patch-apr-util_configure [2]
as this diff is generated by re-runing ./buildconf after [1] has been 
modified.

I'll respond back with the SVN revisions and branches its applied to.

--
